compliance.title: Your data never leaves your device
compliance.processingLocal: All the processing happens locally on your device.

gdpr.title: GDPR compliance
gdpr.description: Protects the personal data and privacy of individuals within the European Union.

ccpa.title: CCPA compliance
ccpa.description: Gives California residents rights over how their personal information is collected, used, and shared.

hipaa.title: HIPAA compliance
hipaa.description: Sets safeguards for handling sensitive health information in the United States healthcare system.

isFree.question: Is igo really free?
isFree.answer: Yes, absolutely. All tools on igo are 100% free to use, with no file limits, no sign-ups, and no watermarks. We believe everyone deserves access to simple, powerful PDF tools without a paywall.

areFilesSecure.question: Are my files secure? Where are they processed?
areFilesSecure.answer: Your files are as secure as possible because they never leave your computer. All processing happens directly in your web browser (client-side). We never upload your files to a server, so you maintain complete privacy and control over your documents.

platforms.question: Does it work on Mac, Windows, and Mobile?
platforms.answer: Yes! Since igo runs entirely in your browser, it works on any operating system with a modern web browser, including Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android.

gdprCompliant.question: Is igo GDPR compliant?
gdprCompliant.answer: Yes. igo is fully GDPR compliant. Since all file processing happens locally in your browser and we never collect or transmit your files to any server, we have no access to your data. This ensures you are always in control of your documents.

dataStorage.question: Do you store or track any of my files?
dataStorage.answer: No. We never store, track, or log your files. Everything you do on igo happens in your browser memory and disappears once you close the page. There are no uploads, no history logs, and no servers involved.

different.question: What makes igo different from other PDF tools?
different.answer: Most PDF tools upload your files to a server for processing. igo never does that. We use secure, modern web technology to process your files directly in your browser. This means faster performance, stronger privacy, and complete peace of mind.

browserBased.question: How does browser-based processing keep me safe?
browserBased.answer: By running entirely inside your browser, igo ensures that your files never leave your device. This eliminates the risks of server hacks, data breaches, or unauthorized access. Your files remain yours—always.

analytics.question: Do you use cookies or analytics to track me?
analytics.answer: We care about your privacy. igo does not track personal information. We use Simple Analytics solely to see anonymous visit counts. This means we can know how many users visit our site, but we never know who you are. Simple Analytics is fully GDPR-compliant and respects your privacy.

support.title: Like My Work?
support.description: igo is a passion project, built to provide a free, private, and powerful PDF toolkit for everyone. If you find it useful, consider supporting its development. Every coffee helps!

merge.title: Merge PDFs
merge.description: Combine whole files, or select specific pages to merge into a new document.
fileModeInstructions: Click and drag the icon to change the order of the files.
In the "Pages" box for each file, you can specify ranges (e.g., "1-3, 5") to merge only those pages.
Leave the "Pages" box blank to include all pages from that file.
pageModeInstructions: All pages from your uploaded PDFs are shown below.
Simply drag and drop the individual page thumbnails to create the exact order you want for your new file.

hero.title: We believe PDF tools should be
hero.subtitle: fast, private, and free.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide the most comprehensive PDF toolbox that respects your privacy and never asks for payment. We believe essential document tools should be accessible to everyone, everywhere, without barriers.

philosophy.label: Our Core Philosophy
philosophy.title: Privacy First. Always.
philosophy.description: In an era where data is a commodity, we take a different approach. All processing for igo tools happens locally in your browser. This means your files never touch our servers, we never see your documents, and we don't track what you do. Your documents remain completely and unequivocally private. It's not just a feature; it's our foundation.

speed.title: Built for Speed
speed.description: No waiting for uploads or downloads to a server. By processing files directly in your browser using modern web technologies like WebAssembly, we offer unparalleled speed for all our tools.

free.title: Completely Free
free.description: No trials, no subscriptions, no hidden fees, and no "premium" features held hostage. We believe powerful PDF tools should be a public utility, not a profit center.

noAccount.title: No Account Required
noAccount.description: Start using any tool immediately. We don't need your email, a password, or any personal information. Your workflow should be frictionless and anonymous.

openSource.title: Open Source Spirit
openSource.description: Built with transparency in mind. We leverage incredible open-source libraries like PDF-lib and PDF.js, and believe in the community-driven effort to make powerful tools accessible to everyone.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Join thousands of users who trust igo for their daily document needs. Experience the difference that privacy and performance can make.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, feedback, or a feature request, please don't hesitate to reach out.
contact.email: You can reach us directly by email at:

licensing.title: Licensing for
licensing.subtitle: Choose the license that fits your needs.

multiTool.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop PDF or image files here, or click to select
multiTool.dropToAdd: Drop PDF or image files to add
multiTool.failedToConvertImages: Failed to convert images to PDF.
multiTool.pagesRendering: Pages are still being rendered. Please wait...
multiTool.selectOnePage: Please select at least one page to download.
multiTool.noPagesToExport: There are no pages to export.

clientProcessing.largeFileMessage: {{tool}} processes this {{size}} selection in your browser. Large documents can use substantial device memory and may make this tab slow or unresponsive. You can still continue.

pdfToWord.nativeTextDetected: Text layer detected in the checked pages. DOCX can still differ in fonts, tables, spacing, and complex layout.
pdfToWord.imageBasedDetected: {{imagePages}} of {{samplePages}} checked pages do not have a usable text layer. This PDF appears to be image-based or scanned; DOCX may contain incomplete or non-editable text.
pdfToWord.postNativeWarning: Review fonts, tables, spacing, and complex layout in the DOCX.
pdfToWord.postImageWarning: Some checked pages had no usable text layer. Review missing words and layout; use OCR PDF first for scanned documents.
pdfToWord.preflightFailed: The PDF was selected, but its contents could not be inspected. You can still choose a conversion mode.
pdfToWord.completeServer: Converted on the IGO server. The temporary source and output will be deleted automatically.

privacy.browser: This file stays in your browser for this conversion mode.
privacy.hybrid: This mode temporarily uploads the PDF to the private IGO server, processes one job at a time, then automatically deletes the source and result.

errors.invalidStructure: This PDF has an invalid internal structure. Try exporting it again from the source application, or use OCR text / visual layout mode.
errors.fontLayout: The PDF contains a font or layout structure that could not be converted as editable text. Try visual layout mode.
errors.encrypted: Password-protected PDFs must be unlocked before conversion.
errors.pageLimit: This conversion mode supports up to {{limit}} pages per PDF.
errors.memoryLimit: The server could not safely allocate enough memory for this PDF. Try visual layout mode, split the PDF, or contact your administrator.
errors.timeout: Conversion took too long and was stopped safely. Try a smaller PDF or contact your administrator.
errors.general: The PDF could not be converted. Retry once; if it still fails, contact your administrator with the time of the attempt.
errors.client: Your browser could not convert this PDF. Try OCR text or visual layout mode.
errors.fileLimit: {{file}} exceeds the maximum size of {{limit}} for PDF to Word.
errors.serverOneFile: Server conversion handles one PDF at a time. The remaining selected files will use browser conversion if possible.
errors.uploadInterrupted: The secure upload was interrupted. Retry once; if it repeats, contact your administrator.
errors.serverUnavailable: The server conversion service is unavailable. Try again later or choose editable text mode.

compressionUpload.interruptedMessage: The upload connection was interrupted before the server received the PDF. Please retry once. If the same issue continues, contact your administrator and include the time of the attempt.

homeHero.title: Privacy-first PDF Workspace
homeHero.subtitle: Choose the PDF tool you need. Document processing runs entirely in your browser, while application access is managed through internal accounts.
homeHero.badgeDesc: Session, CAPTCHA, and RBAC are active.

aboutPage.intro: IGO, short for Internal Government Operation, is an internal PDF workspace dedicated to BPDP that helps document processes run quickly, simply, and under control.
aboutPage.card1Desc: There is no public registration. Accounts are created and managed by administrators.
aboutPage.card2Desc: The core PDF tools run in the browser, so working files stay on the user's device.
aboutPage.card3Desc: The admin role can manage users, reset passwords, and perform bulk account imports.

helpPage.title: Help, Policies & Licensing
helpPage.intro: Usage information, internal policies, frequently asked questions, and support contacts for BPDP staff.
helpPage.policyItem1Text: Requesting or accepting gratuities of any kind in connection with document processing services is prohibited.
helpPage.policyItem2Text: Uploading or sharing work or confidential documents to third-party PDF websites or applications outside igo is prohibited. Use igo, which processes documents locally on your device.
helpPage.policyItem3Text: Comply with the applicable BPDP confidentiality and information security requirements.
helpPage.licenseP1: igo is distributed under the AGPL-3.0-only license, in accordance with the open-source codebase it is built on.
helpPage.licenseP2: This application uses BentoPDF as its PDF processing base/engine. This mention is retained for license attribution, not as product branding.
helpPage.licenseP3: Third-party components such as PDF.js, pdf-lib, Tesseract, PyMuPDF, Ghostscript, CoherentPDF, Lucide, and Phosphor remain subject to their respective licenses.
helpPage.faq1A: Most tools process documents directly in your browser (client-side); your work files are not sent to the server.
helpPage.faq2Q: How do I get an account?
helpPage.faq2A: Accounts are created and managed by the administrator. There is no public registration — contact the administrator to request access.
helpPage.faq3Q: Forgot or want to reset your password?
helpPage.faq3A: Contact the administrator to reset your account password.
helpPage.faq4Q: Can igo be installed as an app (offline)?
helpPage.faq4A: Yes. igo supports PWA — use the "Install" option in your browser to install it on your device and run it like a regular app.
helpPage.faq5Q: Found a bug or an issue?
helpPage.faq5A: Report it to the administrator via the email or phone number listed in the contact section below.
helpPage.contactIntro: If you have any issues, bugs, or questions about using igo, contact the administrator:
